tenants.name: Charleston
tenants.royaltyReportEmailContent:
Dear Franchise Partner,

Please find attached your Royalty Report for the month of reported_month. Please click_here ( url_link ) and approve your royalties.

Please note that if the report is not approved within three business days, the Royalty Report will be auto approved and the deduction for the royalties will be taken.

Thank you,

System4 Accounting Team
tenants.eInvoiceStaffmarking:
Please find attached your invoice from System4 of Charleston for monthly janitorial service.

If you would like to pay your invoice online please click

https://www.system4partners.com/payment/

Thank you for your business.

If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us at billing.sc@system4.com or (678) 626-0163.
tenants.inspectionEmailContent:
System4 would like to take this opportunity to thank you for your business; you are a valued customer.

Just as a reminder, we can provide additional facility services, such as: carpet cleaning, hard floor care, window cleaning, landscaping and many other services. Please contact us if you require any additional services.

Please click on the link below and give us a rating on our service and any other additional comments... Thank you again for your continued business.
